name: codex-project-workflow
description: Structured Codex workflow for scoped planning, research governance, implementation-path checks, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, research, govern, and verify Codex project work.
interface.longDescription: Adds a portable Codex workflow skill for project startup, scoped research, architecture planning, approval boundaries, implementation-path checks, and verification reporting.
defaultPrompt: Plan and verify this project task with Codex Project Workflow.
Review the project state and identify the safest next step.
Verify both the result and the original implementation path.
